title: mitrephora heyneana
intro: Mitrephora heyneana, also known as the Mitrephora plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mitrephora heyneana include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are typically dried and made into a decoction or infusion, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
